ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message containing the request */,
  "request_type" TEXT /* Type of request (e.g., medical help, food) */,
  "request_details" TEXT /* Details of the request */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, in progress, completed) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the request */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the responder or team responsible */,
  "estimated_completion_date" TEXT /* Estimated completion date of the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_requests_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message containing the offer */,
  "offer_type" TEXT /* Type of offer (e.g., medical supplies, shelter) */,
  "offer_details" TEXT /* Details of the offer */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., pending, accepted, declined) */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the offer */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the responder or team responsible */,
  "estimated_availability_date" TEXT /* Estimated availability date of the offer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_offers_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "disaster_severity" INTEGER /* Severity of the disaster in the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the location data was updated */,
  "population_affected" INTEGER /* Number of people affected in the location */,
  "infrastructure_status" TEXT /* Summary of the infrastructure status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., responder, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged into the system */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the request being responded to */,
  "response_details" TEXT /* Details of the response */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date of the response */,
  "response_status" TEXT /* Status of the response (e.g., sent, received, completed) */,
  "assigned_to" INTEGER /* ID of the responder or team responsible */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of response (e.g., medical, food, shelter) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES requests ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_assigned_to FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_to") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "message_locations" (
  "message_location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each message-location pair */,
  "message_id" INTEGER /* ID of the message */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("message_location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_message_locations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
